questions.question: Define Big Data Analytics and explain its importance in modern business. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe Big Data Analytics, its components, and its applications in detail

questions.question: Classify the different types of analytics into Descriptive, Diagnostic, Predictive and Prescriptive. Provide examples for each type. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use tables or flowcharts to illustrate the different types of analytics

questions.question: List the key technologies used in Big Data environment such as Hadoop, Spark, NoSQL databases, etc. Explain their role in handling large datasets. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a brief overview of each technology and its applications in Big Data
